creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Maintainer Given 240505 was committed end of 2019 and still remains without a vuxml entry, 1.4.1* resolves CVE's but bug 257582 was not resolved, and 1.4.2 resolves further security issues, can you please list here:

Each/all versions from 1.3.2 onward, with a list of CVE's that apply/applied to each. This will assist us to get all vuxml entries for them addressed correctly.
